Each piece is hand-carved from genuine rose quartz crystal, known for its cooling and calming properties. The facial roller features dual ends - large for cheeks and forehead, small for under eyes and nose. The gua sha tool provides deeper tissue massage to release tension and sculpt facial contours. Regular use reduces puffiness, improves blood circulation, enhances lymphatic drainage, and boosts collagen production. Comes in a luxury velvet storage pouch with instruction guide. Rose quartz is associated with love and healing energy in crystal therapy.

name: Premium Ashwagandha Powder - Organic 500g
description: Pure organic ashwagandha root powder. Adaptogenic herb for stress relief, energy boost, and immune support.
long_description: Experience the ancient wisdom of Ayurveda with our premium organic ashwagandha powder. Sourced from certified organic farms, this potent adaptogenic herb helps your body manage stress naturally. Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) has been used for over 3,000 years to reduce anxiety, improve sleep quality, enhance cognitive function, and boost energy levels. Our powder is made from pure root extract with high withanolide content (the active compounds). Mix into smoothies, warm milk, or water. Each 500g jar provides approximately 100 servings. Third-party tested for purity and potency. No fillers, additives, or artificial ingredients.

long_description: Fuel your body with nature's most nutrient-dense superfood. Our organic spirulina tablets are made from pure blue-green algae grown in pristine freshwater ponds. Each tablet is packed with complete protein (all 9 essential amino acids), B-vitamins, iron, beta-carotene, and powerful antioxidants like phycocyanin. Spirulina supports immune function, increases energy, aids detoxification, and promotes healthy skin and hair. Our tablets are easy to swallow and have no fishy aftertaste. Sustainably harvested and processed at low temperatures to preserve nutrients. Suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Third-party tested for heavy metals and contaminants.

name: The Body Keeps the Score - Bessel van der Kolk
description: Groundbreaking book on trauma and healing. Understanding how trauma affects the body, brain, and mind.
long_description: A revolutionary approach to trauma healing by renowned psychiatrist Dr. Bessel van der Kolk. This international bestseller explores how trauma reshapes both body and brain, compromising capacities for pleasure, engagement, self-control, and trust. Drawing on decades of research and clinical experience, Dr. van der Kolk offers innovative treatments including neurofeedback, meditation, sports, drama, and yoga. This book has transformed understanding of traumatic stress and its treatment. Essential reading for anyone dealing with trauma, anxiety, or PTSD. Softcover edition with 464 pages. Includes case studies, scientific research, and practical healing strategies. A must-read for therapists, trauma survivors, and anyone interested in mental health.
delivery_info: Free delivery in South Africa (3-5 business days)

name: Breath: The New Science - James Nestor
description: Revolutionary book on breathing science. Learn ancient techniques and modern science for optimal health.
long_description: Discover the lost art and science of breathing with James Nestor's groundbreaking book. Based on decades of research and firsthand experience, this book reveals how the simple act of changing how you breathe can transform your health. Nestor traveled the world to study ancient breathing practices and worked with pulmonary scientists to understand the mechanics of respiration. Learn how proper breathing can prevent snoring and sleep apnea, improve athletic performance, rejuvenate internal organs, halt allergies and asthma, and even straighten spinal structure. Includes practical breathing exercises from Pranayama, Sudarshan Kriya, and other techniques. A New York Times bestseller that will change how you breathe forever.

name: Ultrasonic Aromatherapy Diffuser with LED
description: Premium 300ml ultrasonic diffuser. 7-color LED lighting, auto shut-off, whisper-quiet operation. Modern wood grain design.
long_description: Create a tranquil atmosphere in any room with our premium ultrasonic aromatherapy diffuser. The 300ml water capacity provides 8-10 hours of continuous mist on low setting. Ultrasonic technology breaks down water and essential oils into micro-particles without heat, preserving the therapeutic properties of your oils. Features 7 LED color options (or rotate through all colors), two mist settings (continuous or intermittent), and automatic shut-off when water runs low. Whisper-quiet operation (under 35dB) won't disturb sleep or work. Modern wood grain finish complements any decor. BPA-free materials. Perfect for bedrooms, offices, yoga studios, or meditation spaces. Covers up to 40 square meters.
